description: Cached audit mirror of companion-self's canonical template-manifest. Use for local diffing and operator visibility inside grace-mar; the canonical source remains the upstream manifest at the commit recorded in template-source.json / targeted by instance-contract.json.

paths.description: Concept: Record, Voice, education structure, knowledge boundary, invariants, long-term objectives.
Three-layer state model (evidence, prepared context, governed).
Evidence layer doctrine.
Prepared context layer doctrine.
Governed state layer doctrine.
Prepared context principles.
Evidence to context reference pipeline.
Pipeline stage: evidence to Change Proposal v1 file.
Pipeline stage: proposal JSON into explicit review.
Pipeline stage: reviewed proposal to governed merge.
Precedence across evidence, prepared context, governed state, accepted change-review.
Order of operations when sources disagree; no silent winners.
Authority classes and surface-key semantics; links to config/authority-map.json.
Observability doctrine and contract; links to build-observability-report.py.
Legibility requirements for meaningful actions; links to receipts and observability.
Optional action receipt doctrine; distinct from merge receipts and Record.
Protocol: Sovereign Merge Rule, schema (SELF, self-skill-*, self-evidence), evidence linking.
Seed Phase v2 entrypoint: formation pipeline before activation; links to stage/readiness/confidence/artifact specs.
Canonical seed stages 0–7 (intake through readiness gate).
Readiness gate: blocking vs non-blocking, thresholds, re-run after upgrade.
Confidence categories, numeric bands, mapping to artifacts.
Seed artifact file set; layout under _template and demo; validation pointers.
Seed intent artifact doctrine (seed_intent.json).
How to run validate-seed-phase.py strict vs placeholder mode.
Permanent system rules (democratize Alpha-style education; sovereignty; knowledge boundary).
Skill-work parent index (submodules: skill-work-alpha-school, skill-work-human-teacher).
Alpha School reference (skill-work-alpha-school submodule): benchmarks, 2-hour screen-time target, equivalent metrics.
Structured Alpha benchmarks (YAML) with evidence IDs; optional comparison targets.
Alpha/Moonshots #233 insights for business plan and white paper (skill-work-alpha-school submodule).
Human teaching/learning objectives (skill-work-human-teacher submodule): read and modulate skill-think.
Skill-work-human-teacher submodule index.
Daily cadence architecture: morning orientation + night consolidation + session handoff + harvest (cross-agent extraction axis), handoff contract, runner modes, cadence event audit, extension points.
Append-only audit of coffee/dream/bridge runs (optional harvest). Per-run telemetry, not Record truth.
Session Harvest Packet contract — section headings and rules; midstream import (no coffee tail); sibling to bridge packet.
Cadence event append helper — CLI + importable function for logging coffee/dream/bridge/harvest runs to work-cadence-events.md.
Harvest ritual helper — on-disk checklist, optional markdown template, optional cadence log (--kind harvest).
Coffee — consolidated morning cadence runner: mode dispatch over good-morning-brief.py with branch snapshot.
Dream — consolidated night cadence runner: good-night-brief.py with closeout + git summary.
Instance patterns and reference implementation (Grace-Mar variations, analyst contract, staging format).
Conflict resolution types; preserve history; advisory conflict check; links to engine spec.
Review surface for recursion-gate; derived UI; contradiction escalation; reference Grace-Mar inbox.
Contradiction engine: identity-diff object, classification, API shape, temporal validity, audit.
Change review v1 doctrine entrypoint: post-seed governed self-revision (provenance, states, gate).
State proposal doctrine: human term for Change Proposal v1 JSON under review-queue/proposals/.
Contradiction classes, resolution semantics, blocking vs non-blocking, policy priority during change review.
Canonical change scopes for proposals (identity, pedagogy, upgrade_collision, etc.).
Change-review lifecycle: detect through log; non-goals vs canonical queue and human gate.
Change-review: structured proposal for governed post-seed change.
Change-review: decision record for a proposal.
Change-review: before/after diff payload (generic object shapes in v1).
Change-review: queue summary of proposals.
Change-review: audit event log entries.
Optional JSON Schema for config/source-of-truth.json precedence map.
Default layer precedence (governed_state, accepted_change_objects, prepared_context, evidence).
Default authority class per surface key (layers, scopes, cadence packets).
JSON Schema for config/authority-map.json.
JSON Schema for users/demo/observability/observability-report.json.
Persisted boundary hint snapshot per gate candidate (surfaces, suggested proposal_class, confidence).
Compact replay step derived from pipeline/audit JSONL (interpretation layer).
Heuristic lane-mix summary for recent pipeline activity (not token attribution).
SELF schema/structure scaffold for new users only.
IX-A: what they've learned (self-knowledge) scaffold.
Durable identity commitments scaffold (identity, boundaries, role commitments).
IX-B: what they're curious about (self-curiosity) scaffold.
IX-C: voice, preferences, values (self-personality) scaffold.
THINK (self-skill-think) scaffold.
WRITE (self-skill-write) scaffold.
WORK (self-skill-work) scaffold.
STEWARD (self-skill-steward) scaffold — governance literacy and gate participation.
Cross-lane self-work control-plane scaffold.
Evidence schema/structure scaffold.
Recursive-gate staging scaffold (candidates at the gate).
Ephemeral context scaffold.
SELF-LIBRARY scaffold: governance + empty entries; reference-facing shelf (not IX-A).
WORK user module: business/commercial context; seeded via work_business_seed.json (not docs/skill-work/work-business/).
WORK user module: development/technical context; seeded via work_dev_seed.json (not docs/skill-work/work-dev/).
Optional legacy LIB row example (grace-mar-derived); not the default template shelf.
Canonical 10 challenges + 5 open mysteries; evolution rules for template and instances.
Layer labels, forbidden crossing globs for mechanical checks.
Checklist: durable identity vs operational self-work vs ephemeral memory.
Validates optional YAML frontmatter on users/**/*.md when present.
Enforces docs/layer-map.json forbiddenCrossings globs.
Interactive human gate; skipped when CI=true or --yes.
Writes state/provenance/record-docs-summary.json for users/ and docs/ (output gitignored).
Heuristic must-persist token density under users/.
Validates seed-phase artifact dirs against schema-registry (strict or --allow-placeholders).
Semantic checks for seed_intent vs seed_readiness (beyond JSON Schema); exit 1 when pass contradicts intent quality.
Pytest discovery for seed-phase regression tests (alongside pyproject.toml on instances).
Validates users/<id>/review-queue trees against change-review schemas (strict or --allow-empty for template scaffold).
Scaffold Change Proposal v1 JSON under review-queue/proposals (placeholder state refs).
Human-readable summary of a Change Proposal v1 file (not identity-diff).
Compare two layer tokens against config/source-of-truth.json precedence.
Look up authority class for a surface key in config/authority-map.json.
Emit observability-report.json from review-queue proposals + subprocess validators.
Renders a human-readable Markdown file from one identity-diff JSON artifact.
Generates seed_dossier.md from seed JSON artifacts.
Single source of truth for seed JSON artifact filenames and schema paths (validator + genesis hash).
Deterministic seed_constitution.json from seed-phase JSON scaffolds (run after validate-seed-phase).
Validates seed_constitution.json against schema + policy checks (memory_contract in hierarchy).
Signed seed birth certificate (genesis hash + optional Ed25519); see requirements-seed-phase-signing.txt.
Example runtime config (constitutional critique off by default); copy to runtime_config.json locally.
Optional gated constitutional critique hook for Voice (disabled unless runtime_config enables).
Plotly radar HTML from seed_confidence_map.json; optional plotly/kaleido.
Copy template root to a new instance directory and seed users/<id>/seed-phase from _template.
Optional pip deps for birth certificate signing (cryptography).
Optional pip deps for confidence radar (plotly, kaleido).
Starter: text file to prepared-context JSON stub.
pip deps for seed-phase validation (jsonschema, pytest, cryptography for birth-cert tests).
Starter schema registry manifest pointer.
